name: short_chat
prompt: Explain why GPU layers, context size, batch size, and micro-batch interact in local LLM inference. Keep it concise and practical.

name: medium_reasoning
prompt: Write a short troubleshooting checklist for a local language model server that becomes slower after increasing context size. Include likely causes and a step-by-step debug order.

name: longer_generation
prompt: You are benchmarking a local model runner. Produce a structured report with sections for memory pressure, throughput cliffs, KV cache behavior, flash attention tradeoffs, and recommended safe defaults for a 16 GB VRAM system.
